name: Local Bounti Corporation/DE
business: Local Bounti is a controlled environment agriculture company that produces sustainably grown produce, focused primarily on living and loose leaf lettuce. The company distributes its products to approximately 13,000 retail locations across 35 U.S. states primarily through direct relationships with blue-chip retail customers. Local Bounti's primary products include living butter lettuce, packaged leafy greens, and cress.

exposures.sentence: Local Bounti is a controlled environment agriculture ("CEA") company that produces sustainably grown produce, focused primarily on living and loose leaf lettuce.
We intend to continue to optimize our facilities through design and materials improvements and by leveraging computer vision, artificial intelligence and robotics to optimize energy and labor usage.
In February 2026, we were issued U.S. Patent No. 12,557,741, titled 'Optimizing Growing Process in a Hybrid Growing Environment Using Computer Vision and Artificial Intelligence.'
We intend to continue to optimize our facilities through design and materials improvements and by leveraging computer vision, artificial intelligence and robotics to optimize energy and labor usage.

catalysts.event: Launch of family-sized 10-ounce Romano Caesar Salad Kit in the Pacific Northwest
catalysts.sentence: The launch of our family-sized 10-ounce Romano Caesar Salad Kit in the Pacific Northwest continues to build momentum with consumers at retail the kit realized a 75% increase in its baseline velocity (units sold per store per week) during the fourth quarter.

catalysts.event: Secured two additional retail accounts expected to launch in coming months (first quarter 2026)
catalysts.sentence: During the first quarter of 2026, we secured two additional accounts that are expected to launch in the coming months a large premier retail customer covering more than 250 stores with a six SKU placement rollout and a large regional retailer.

catalysts.event: Issuance of U.S. Patent No. 12,557,741 for AI-driven growing optimization
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we were issued U.S. Patent No. 12,557,741, titled 'Optimizing Growing Process in a Hybrid Growing Environment Using Computer Vision and Artificial Intelligence.'

catalysts.event: Tower upgrades completed across facilities resulting in ~10% yield capacity increase
catalysts.sentence: Tower upgrades were completed at each of our facilities during the fourth quarter, which resulted in enhanced production efficiency and an approximate 10% increase in run-rate yield capacity to reach our highest yields to date.

catalysts.event: Select investments in California facilities to improve yields by up to 20%
catalysts.sentence: We are also making select investments in our California facilities to improve operational efficiency, which we believe can improve yields by as much as 20%, resulting in increased throughput and enhanced margins.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. market for fruit and vegetables is greater than $100 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to publicly available research in October 2024, the U.S. market for fruit and vegetables has an estimated total addressable market of greater than $100 billion.
